notes: Creature, data, and selected system TODO translations from gatbage/reference/localization/missing-en.md.

entries.gt_03259725ce0af2: The mycelium is already cut away. Only teeth and a wet smell remain.
entries.gt_03dfd1f6455cc1: gnawed forms, sour ink, and a blank form with no signature
entries.gt_060cc77af838d3: silver tooth, blue-black scale, gas bubble, rare shark scale
entries.gt_062038c7e1e018: The turnstile requires a metro ticket.
entries.gt_0684539a9f3199: womb node, warm slime, rare meat rune after clearing the brood
entries.gt_0710fdae137493: Seal food in a container or throw meat bait away from your path: after a miss, the Zhornaya Tvar takes a long time to recover.
entries.gt_07185d17d5da1f: You cut zhelemish from the mouth. The skin argues, but the haul is in your pocket.
entries.gt_09396a453b68fb: Need electrical tape, sealant, cloth, or a cleaning tool.
entries.gt_0a804056650b94: The NII capsule is addressed to Betonov: 'Go to Z+22 with water, a filter, and an empty container. After the lift, keep to the right Z mark, do not open the sample; Yakov pays only for an intact seal and route.'
entries.gt_0ca82d7747785c: The Herald pulls air into its horns: close the line before the flash.
entries.gt_0da27330499543: ${train.label}: doors closed, route started. Hands away, thoughts too.
entries.gt_0ef5b3b1f8459d: Read the display, wet threshold, and wrong metal: inspect the cabin, throw bait, or retreat from the lift vestibule at once.
entries.gt_0f469d278bcf90: Kill the host at range and finish the slug before it crawls over; fire, UV, and a closed hermodoor buy time.
entries.gt_10687add05c6da: Do not fight under a lamp: draw it three cells from the light or around a corner, and use any available switch before it closes.
entries.gt_10eba471923a10: Yakov hid the green shavings apart from the papers: 'This is not a purchase, this is seizure from logic.' +${reward}₽
entries.gt_16bde0741dd913: The shavings scattered into gray dust. The squeal proved the mistake: PSI -6.
entries.gt_183d3a51f82307: Slimevik lashed acid slime in the corner
entries.gt_186d773bef1e3a: The capsule does not fit in the inventory.
entries.gt_18b91e87b4ee5c: Projector stopped. The frame froze in the walls.
entries.gt_18f7dd1dfa5278: The tube arrived with an empty NII container and a note on the lid: 'sample left by market, signature came back by lift'. Yakov will accept the container as a leak trace; the market will ask where the jar itself is.
entries.gt_190b9c4cd6f7ae: Do not spend all your ammo on bodies: tape the crack with electrical tape or sealant, burn out the source with fire, lead bodies away with bait, or sprint through the swarm in one short burst.
entries.gt_194520f3315516: The turnstile is cooling down after the last error.
entries.gt_1a7a934a04214f: Decide at once: kill the Matka before new brood, clear the children, or leave with the loot. A mixed plan quickly makes the room tight.
entries.gt_1b14dc3c1a31e6: Capsule handed to control. +35₽, water coupon. Now it is official noise.
entries.gt_1c1642af32ac72: ${npc.name ?? 'Покупатель'} has nowhere to hide the shavings apart from the documents.
entries.gt_1c2cfa3a68b605: Turn in the market or the evidence
entries.gt_1c40558a54ba1d: Do not corner her and do not start first: calm talk or an NII container ends the encounter without a fight, while a wounded Gnilushka makes a short dangerous lunge only in close quarters.
entries.gt_1d1a31ee2db7fb: The Mancobus volley went into concrete: cover worked.
entries.gt_1d9bf07fa2b1ce: Do not stand in the bright strip: a dark corner, a switched-off line, or a cabinet between you breaks the green lock.
entries.gt_1dd8ad20cf348a: Do not fight in water: dry lit concrete, UV, fire, a cleaning kit, and a dry edge cut the slime woman's tempo.
entries.gt_1e2abe29c8033f: The mycelium catches soles and tastes blood. To the edge, to salt, or to fire.
entries.gt_1e6bcd7b5d2119: rare slime-body sample only into an NII container; without a container, only a toxic trace remains
entries.gt_1fce7003a01e41: The display clicks, but this line does not accept boarding here.
entries.gt_20559bc8ec9dee: The Creator counts only the open contour. Keep cover between volleys and do not stand in green markings.
entries.gt_22738447790d35: The Snake crushes with a concrete flank: -${amount} HP. Wait for the tail or wedge the screen.
entries.gt_22bdd140303dcd: Mancobus lost its guard formation and shoots less often, but heavier. Do not stand on the gun axis.
entries.gt_22cdbc07ef5b71: ${entityDisplayName(e)} is aiming: ${npcRangedThreatLabel(ws)}. Break the line or wait out the volley.
entries.gt_22edf44b25ec2f: empty memory, cold draft, rare PSI dust
entries.gt_231b28a2c62282: Clue: ${floorRunEntryRouteCard(entry)} Return: lift ${back} to previous Z.
entries.gt_2345341492edd6: Resolve the weak wall before it is gnawed through: sealant or a block kit closes the seam, noise changes the tempo, fire breaks the feeding.
entries.gt_23d29bcc06e015: wet circuit board, blue pipe rings, scorched pressure gauge, rare energy cell
entries.gt_244780d8d81893: The floor section does not match the ceiling. In a few seconds it will shift.
entries.gt_2479bbf859dd2a: Armor holds knives and panic bullets: lead it around machines, break tempo with buckshot, sledgehammer, grenade, or heavy weapon.
entries.gt_24f818c3df5ac2: The queue stopped changing places: too many hands reached for one window. Step away if you only want to eat or drink.
entries.gt_255e8277cb9191: ${entityDisplayName(zombie)} infected ${oldName}. The outbreak moved across the floor.
entries.gt_260a79f4a84fb0: The forged card went to the black market for 32₽. Someone will eat without a queue; someone will not eat at all.
entries.gt_262fb21321605c: The Creator killed you with a green contour and no cover
entries.gt_27c262da402fb6: Mycelium ash crunches underfoot. Nothing feeds here now.
entries.gt_284b1bc1a67b4a: Grinding at the hermodoor: ${Math.max(0, Math.ceil(runtime.damageAt - state.time))}s until failure.
entries.gt_29d23d5e696fca: The automaton was silenced bare-handed. ${cleared} cells crumbled, fingers trembling.
entries.gt_2a5ea0234ed41f: Salt took the mycelium in a dry circle. A boiled zhelemish remained in the center.
entries.gt_2a628bad879967: The Choral Matka spawned brood: ${spawned}. Clear the children or hit the source now.
entries.gt_2ad1bf53e339ab: ${npcName} filed the shavings as a green incident. The sale sounds like admitting the route. +${reward}₽
entries.gt_2bda5e61681895: The lift brought a warm smell and went silent. Concrete scratches above the cabin; a thin thread hangs from the ceiling.
entries.gt_2cf194f91ec9bb: Doors and walls do not hold a spirit: change position before contact, keep distance, and break tempo with UV light.
entries.gt_2e4b1e81112a1d: The road is long. I am not stopping.
entries.gt_2e6e0cf9128b09: Red slime holds your feet. Go around, burn it, or clean it with a kit.
entries.gt_2eb8a394d3c1d7: ${riding.label}: you stepped onto the platform. First to the wall, then read the display.
entries.gt_2f8e50a4f5ccb6: The capsule is warm and smells of rubber: 'If the pipe goes silent before the siren, do not wait for the next mail. Close the receiving hatch, take the pressure log, and go to the nearest herm.'
entries.gt_30bb9f513829c6: Move to break free. R with a cleaning kit or fire will remove the stick.
entries.gt_319a3dd1d763dd: The filter caught some borshchevik seeds.
entries.gt_3218f329551bf3: You spotted movement above the cabin. Arachna did not risk dropping on someone looking up.
entries.gt_340d2621d76c87: The iron rings before striking: do not step on straight bars by walls, pull it to the center, and hit from range.
entries.gt_3622f760437223: Noise tore Arachna from the ceiling. Now it falls badly, catching on the cabin rail.
entries.gt_3655a90875fc00: A neat stack of iron by the rack can jump first: test it with a shot or keep distance, wait out the lunge, and finish the brittle body.
entries.gt_3663765597ad9b: Do not wake it without an exit: early fire, toxic slime, and a sealed threshold break the chase, while frequent shooting swells the meat only to a limited cap.
entries.gt_36962fcd1a9bb9: Small samosbor moved as a wave from ${ax},${ay}.
entries.gt_36f39f2d3b228d: ${train.label} struck bone: -38 HP. The driver did not brake; the doors were already closing.
entries.gt_38390becd172b8: The lift does not add up: display says ${site.fakeFloorLabel}, the gap breathes damp. You can step away or throw bait.
entries.gt_3a58c33c333ab7: wet nerve slime, quarantine card, rare antibiotic from a torn-off host
entries.gt_3aa9a5feb25165: Gnilushka broke into a run: now corners and claws have replaced conversation.
entries.gt_3aef824616fc9f: The Herald killed you with an open threshold line
entries.gt_3bba8c591e636f: The panel hums empty: there are no fresh cement traces nearby.
entries.gt_3dabd3db250f22: The Hermodoor Borer scrapes ${target.roomName}: the door still holds ${Math.ceil(delay)}s.
entries.gt_3e806e9c08611e: The pneumotube thudded dully against a clamp. Letters are piling up behind the wall.
entries.gt_3ea308fd92e49f: The Paragraph corrects in a straight line for 15 cells: break line of sight with a cabinet or corner, rush in right after the shot. Point blank, it loses distance and cannot finish the clause.
entries.gt_3ee7432cab9c23: There is no platform behind the door. The train keeps its route and does not accept a jump as an exit.
entries.gt_3f606f154ae3b5: Filter and container keep the Slimevik at a safe distance.
entries.gt_41308061108b8f: Place in the small caravan recorded. The middle moves quieter.
entries.gt_413cd1274abdb3: NET TERMINAL GEN key. Warm piece; terminals recognize it as access.
entries.gt_41ea5c3ec96eaa: The frame squeezed the cell underfoot: the white place was held at the cost of pain.
entries.gt_42e9180f35f80c: Hladon deflated through ${method.label}. The pocket became passable.
entries.gt_4261cf60238cbb: Check jambs before looting, close the door behind you, and cross the threshold backward: Bezekhiy is weak face to face, but strikes sharply in the back by an open doorway.
entries.gt_43caaa3f160b14: Dangerous in a crowd and doorway: draw it out of a kitchen, queue, or ward into an empty passage and finish it before the first grab.
entries.gt_44c02ec2d934df: Morning. Need the restroom and a bite.
entries.gt_44d8ae07499450: Lift Arachna no longer holds the shaft. The button is cooling.
entries.gt_455c656e662a53: Find Nikanor the Burned in the Meat Lower.
entries.gt_46478bc23a9499: Seroburmaline catches the gaze. Avert your eyes.
entries.gt_4753a08ff24922: A cold draft warns of one passage through a closed door: move into open space or break the phase with a precise shot or UV.
entries.gt_47846cf9964af1: Old trace pulls at your legs and cuts soles.
entries.gt_478b6b2a02233f: The Choral Matka opens child mouth ${opened}. The refrain is close.
entries.gt_47ce8228527850: Something clicked in the shaft, but Arachna found no floor under its leap. The cabin stayed warm and wrong.
entries.gt_47fcde809c9ea1: The section jerked, but could not wall you in. Your ribs remembered the hit.
entries.gt_48dcab53021856: The lift carried you away before the thread held the weight. The smell stayed in the shaft.
entries.gt_4984abc739be40: Samosbor field rebuilt section r${wave.fieldRadius}: ${field.indices.length} cells.
entries.gt_4bab1f85fd0575: Seroburmaline to the side. Do not hold your gaze.
entries.gt_4c1be88a606488: An armor plate fell from Zakalennaya Armatura.
entries.gt_4c24c2c3de3a33: Do not stick your head out! They are outside!
entries.gt_4eac36684d796c: Find Jean Voidling. He knows where to open the return portal.
entries.gt_4f1c0f33c18776: I am sleeping... why are you waking me?
entries.gt_4f80aa4a219bd0: Raw zhelemish feeds, spoils the sample, dries the throat, and leaves a sanitary trace if witnessed.
entries.gt_4f98a8fb949e40: ${npcName} bought the shavings and wrapped them twice. Now the question bought you back and knows your door. +${reward}₽
entries.gt_50a2a924e6354f: Tag N-089 warmed the shaft: the next lift jerk holds the normal route.
entries.gt_50a54b73dfff57: The automaton is already silenced. The concrete keeps its usual shape.
entries.gt_5124bc93518111: Living tunnels move: ${runtime.roots.length} nodes, ${runtime.refs.size} open cells.
entries.gt_52b413cb1101dc: The Creator rewrote the first line. Volleys are slow: change cover, do not stand in the light.
entries.gt_52e9ee8c2f4202: Do not press close without a filter and container: the Slimevik does not hunt first, but long contact dries PSI, and a wounded one strikes with a weak acid whip.
entries.gt_532225e12c7389: greasy chitin, spoiled order, rare quarantine card from the collar
entries.gt_5355fae8b0dbc3: Capsule N-0 promises an open pipe archive, but the paper is too fresh: no shift seal, post number, or sorting-roller trace. Believing it means coming to an empty pipe and an extra inspection.
entries.gt_53e421e2ae9f72: Do not enter the straight sector: remove the guards first, then hit from corners between volleys. Walls and columns cut the firing tempo.
entries.gt_5472770f75dcb8: ${entityDisplayName(e)} lost the firing line. Cover worked.
entries.gt_55486ca01aba0d: The stamp landed evenly. Forged ration card received; an even stamp is more dangerous than a crooked one.
entries.gt_55ab72fba1ef8b: The meat went under the caps. The mycelium released a fresh zhelemish by the edge.
entries.gt_5616951dd5962c: Pneumomail accepted the evidence: ${itemName(evidence)}. Return token: +25₽.
entries.gt_580eea4aa0384f: Train doors are closed. You can get off at the next platform; keep your thoughts inside too.
entries.gt_590739a01f9ee3: ${itemName(couponId)} accepted: issued ${itemName(grantId)}. The queue saw it.
entries.gt_5a5f212850802d: torn order, sealing-wax dust, and wording that still moves
entries.gt_5a662348202988: Shelter compromised: ${rec.roomName}. Find another entrance or repair it now.
entries.gt_5a6b1e68815da1: Forgery turned in with registry extract. Part of the ration returned to the queues, and the market remembered a face.
entries.gt_5b0a972bd07098: Water paid for a place in the queue. The crowd moved over for one breath; bread was shoved into your hand.
entries.gt_5c0fdc32d5072b: Free time. Can rest a bit.
entries.gt_5c8cfdf7036366: Slepoglaz charges a green line toward where you made noise or stood a second ago: make noise, step aside, and close right after the beam while it is blind and weak point blank.
entries.gt_5c95af2bd7f8e4: NET terminal: ACCESS DENIED. White Safeguard is looking for the nearest passage.
entries.gt_5ca1f0286c065d: Bait went into the screen. The Snake got stuck and shortened.
entries.gt_5cacd3de06b531: The interception hatch is bitten shut by your own plug.
entries.gt_5ce849bebdf64c: Sealant gripped the living node. Old passages stuck together: ${cleared} cells.
entries.gt_5f0f933c51178e: The jammer caught the rhythm. ${cleared} living cells became floor.
entries.gt_5f3b6a21921379: Raw lump: eat from hunger, give to Mavra for boiling, turn in to Nikita, sell to Klim, or burn the wet corner.
entries.gt_60f7dc4fa31ed2: Source closed. Sample sealed without a direct look.
entries.gt_61297b0fc4c4e1: Heat keeps Hladon at a distance.
entries.gt_62bd9f3fa3f1c3: Bread bought a place at the water window. Coupon received, but nearby elbows remembered the jump.
entries.gt_650b423b0bf740: The Herald's horns cracked. It keeps distance: do not step into a long corridor.
entries.gt_6590238738558b: Safe dry zhelemish taken from the salted circle.
entries.gt_65deddc4caec2d: Pneumomail node: sorting other people's capsules
entries.gt_6603cb171bd954: The web flies in a straight line and holds briefly: break the line with a door or rack, cut with knife or saw, burn with fire, or punish with buckshot up close.
entries.gt_674a25b887037a: false pass, too-neat household item, rare nonhuman detector
entries.gt_674f2c00abfd34: Beacon off. Nearby squares are silent.
entries.gt_698176415f007b: Stand in the center of the portal before the volleys return.
entries.gt_6a34267e105ead: Mancobus caught you in the straight volley sector
entries.gt_6a88fb9ce15f28: Cement memory is being erased here; steps become lighter.
entries.gt_6be5337244246d: Gnilushka does not answer at once: 'Do not corner me. I remember only a gray corridor and a soft door.'
entries.gt_6c3f165d644127: Keep food in a container, throw bait away from the exit, and burn or shoot through the narrow passage while the swarm spreads along the flanks.
entries.gt_6c5dbcfa8f528e: The portal threw you into the Void: doors name other rooms, documents do not match exits.
entries.gt_6c9e789df5a60e: The amnesia panel reset fresh traces. You can go back, but not for long.
entries.gt_6d19cb6af015c7: Listen to the wet chorus: either crush the source before the brood, or clear the children and hit the Matka in the short open window.
entries.gt_6d4344ec368d5d: The panel jammed the sorter. Belts went silent for a few breaths.
entries.gt_6d597945a07c2a: Arachna tore loose from noise and struck the cabin rail.
entries.gt_6dc4d335d7455d: Passage to the Void opened in ${portalZoneName}!
entries.gt_6dfa39b8802fcd: Enter fully stocked: keep cover between volleys, leave the green light, and do not spend a dash without an exit.
entries.gt_703c3c1ea1c477: LIFT ARACHNA: warm cabin, thread in the shaft. Look up or move away from the lift.
entries.gt_7063f587238cc1: Baked-in route presses the chest: cement is already closing the way back.
entries.gt_707a16c1b0421c: A swarm came out of the crack. The source must be taped or burned.
entries.gt_70c2304b75e180: The Protocolist closes the fight with a protocol: drop or hide official papers, hit with short burst damage, or leave the room before pressure grows.
entries.gt_7165f18914e88d: Do not accept him in the trough: pull the Lotochnik onto dry concrete, break pursuit through a dry threshold, and hit while wet armor has not returned.
entries.gt_73174d84af88ea: Keep a door, corner, or column between volleys: the Herald guards an open line, not a hero.
entries.gt_736c876b16a0d9: Slimevik ate ${trade.itemName} and removed slime nearby: ${cleaned} cells.
entries.gt_73ccabbdfac966: Shoot the red crack during the short freeze, break the straight line with a corner, or put a door, table, or cabinet between you.
entries.gt_7442a5e29eb01e: The tube arrived empty: inside are dust, old filter smell, and a torn wax trace. That means the parcel was removed earlier; the capsule can be turned in as evidence, or left untouched to avoid taking someone else's debt.
entries.gt_745a4a80e8027c: The room clicked, and you ended up at another seam of the same section.
entries.gt_74c2715cbc939f: The stamp pad clicked dry. Need a blank, an extract, or a coupon that can be spoiled.
entries.gt_75088d22307ba4: Mancobus wheezes before the final third. Retreat is available: the corner matters more than finishing.
entries.gt_767773bca18d85: The Snake head is looking straight here. There is one step to get away.
entries.gt_7839a2afc79c9b: black slime sample, glass dust, rare cloudy pupil from the collector
entries.gt_7869e19a52b990: Keep distance from the sap and seed umbel: chopping opens a path without smoke, fire kills quickly but gives a short spore burst.
entries.gt_7a8792159acba0: Hermodoor Borer killed before failure. The door holds.
entries.gt_7aa47bdd807553: Pseudolift settled into the shaft. Doors became doors again.
entries.gt_7b3108098b2023: On duty. Do not distract me.
entries.gt_7c9b808ed06876: Panelnik's dusty hand braced against the wall: armor holds the hit, lure it to the center.
entries.gt_7d509d6ac4aeb0: Boiled: cheap poultice for yourself or risky sale as fake medicine.
entries.gt_7ed33ccf6ae59f: ${npcName} accepted the green shavings as a returned wall syllable. Money was counted without looking into the peephole. +${reward}₽
entries.gt_7f268c8ce64ce3: Wave frontier: ${snapshot.head}/${snapshot.frontierLength} queued=${snapshot.queuedCount} touched=${snapshot.touchedCount} regen=${snapshot.regeneratedCells} stitch=${snapshot.stitchedCells}
entries.gt_7f72b3e5c5e4ce: Infections on floor: ${runtime.infections}. Crowd breaks into deadmen.
entries.gt_7fb20109349051: Do not let the host reach the guards: expose the sickness before witnesses, quarantine, strike before the command shout, or lure him away from food stores.
entries.gt_806d80252c1724: The hatch is still ringing after the last break-in.
entries.gt_80b3144fb46eae: You struck into the shaft before the leap. The thread snapped, and Arachna went higher, where the lift does not answer.
entries.gt_822188de76d852: Need heat: vent tag, boiling water, asbestos sealant, or flamethrower.
entries.gt_84562ee2bf5a2a: Hermodoor Borer went quiet in the door seam.
entries.gt_85d8d5239f5693: The voice that led you here was the Creator. Treat new announcements as traps.
entries.gt_86879a6d19efee: Light leads Lishennyy to you: throw a flashlight or candle as bait, turn off the beam before a turn, and do not hold contact.
entries.gt_870c3d4fbb5b9e: Dried: poor field ration for a sortie or cheap sale to those who buy without asking about a seal.
entries.gt_87315eb4cfa939: Seroburmaline is silent: eyes on the floor.
entries.gt_87520c7bcad016: Phase shift! You pass through matter
entries.gt_88359fa616bc46: charred cloth, bone button, rare liquidator report on a composite body
entries.gt_8d16ba7aab5041: Step off the straight plasma line, wait for the volley, and enter during the reload pause. A wall, door, or apparatus breaks targeting.
entries.gt_8e00c9ee8c6bf1: The lift mouth holds the threshold. Step out of the vestibule so it snaps shut.
entries.gt_8f10392a479fec: I am at work. Lots to do.
entries.gt_901d4941d99da5: The Herald's voice drowned against an obstacle.
entries.gt_90b07d70e9be5d: The Creator's contour lost proof: cover broke the line.
entries.gt_92fb151c3b1ead: Boiling removes the main risk, but does not make it medicine and does not clean up a sale to a patient.
entries.gt_9286e9c689c6ae: boards with green text, wiring, rare energy cell from a local server
entries.gt_932c773f5f12f1: The Creator opened the return error. Finish only from cover: the portal will be in its place.
entries.gt_941d379689c9a6: Return loop brought the route back: ${route.label} -> ${destination.label}.
entries.gt_94b3280f23d9f8: Fog shark gas bubble burst in empty fog.
entries.gt_94f5829fabc40d: UV spotlight will not turn on: battery dead
entries.gt_9535eeb80e2688: Check operational warnings: they say which room is lying.
entries.gt_958202f335018f: Denial Safeguard appeared near the terminal.
entries.gt_95af5ae34dc829: Gnilushka backs away and hides her face in gray hair. After a hit she does not believe words.
entries.gt_95ff56de87ede1: Do not enter the red center without salt, fire, or a cutting tool: roots hit only in a short radius, and nearby red mold slowly heals the source.
entries.gt_961dec75d27b39: The Kontorshchik is slow without a paper trail: put forms, passes, and stamps in a box or throw a cheap form as bait. By cabinets and desks, break the grab while the paper stops rustling.
entries.gt_96245a1e27c331: Slimevik lashed ${target.type === EntityType.PLAYER ? 'тебя' : entityDisplayName(target)} with acid slime: -${dmg}
entries.gt_96e2e9f7de5092: Use as a cheap fake dressing while there is no real medicine and water can still be lost.
entries.gt_977639c09356eb: Slimevik left a sticky trace: water -2${psiLoss > 0 ? ', ПСИ -1' : ''}. Keep distance or a filter.
entries.gt_980e7b2656af08: Borshchevik seeds tangled the map and light.
entries.gt_98b724f0cb21ba: Dry concrete breaks the wet PSI line: do not backpedal through water, cross to the dry edge, and hit with a short burst while pressure is broken.
entries.gt_990274f5b14f8d: The Creator fell. The return portal opened in its place.
entries.gt_990b8d93874d43: Do not chase the thin shadow into a dark corridor: hold position, switch on light or make noise so it loses the line and returns weak.
entries.gt_9915421d2386c9: Fast and weak: meet it in a wide passage, drop it with a cheap shot before contact, and do not spend your last magazine on the first one.
entries.gt_9cdfc33b46fbae: Wave cleanup: containers-${snapshot.deletedContainers} items-${snapshot.deletedItems} proj-${snapshot.deletedProjectiles} cues-${snapshot.prunedRouteCues} reloc=${snapshot.relocatedEntities}
entries.gt_9f230b338a580d: Step off the wet straight line before the charge ends: the automaton fires only along the water line, cools down for a long time after a volley, and handles a point-blank flank poorly.
entries.gt_9f301a79c1270f: Pneumomail is listed here, but it is not breathing.
entries.gt_a1f4493fa389b3: Through the noise of the Meat Lower you hear human breathing. Someone nearby is alive; find them before the next fight.
entries.gt_a3ba65d58bf0ac: Do not enter black water face-first: light the trough, throw a noise can, or fire a test shot, then pull the Chernosliz to a dry edge.
entries.gt_a403f6b54d26fd: Salted mycelium is already cut away. Only wet rot remains.
entries.gt_a404e324a0a14f: A weak hit rang off hardened armor.
entries.gt_a6c742d8a94166: Source closed. Sample crumbled into the cracks.
entries.gt_a6e649ae8053a9: Bare hands only made the node twitch. Concrete bit the skin.
entries.gt_a90ca611318752: You left the lift vestibule. Pseudolift snapped shut and pretended to be an ordinary cabin.
entries.gt_a9238c04dff3f5: Pull it to the center of the room: by a wall or seam, Shovnik accelerates and hits harder; without an edge it loses tempo.
entries.gt_aa6913559d81b6: Do not chase the silhouette in fog: hold the corner and listen for the side step, while light, fire, or leaving the fog patch returns the strike to the real body.
entries.gt_aabb5045936e17: Lift Arachna falls from the ceiling by the lift. The doors close too late.
entries.gt_ad0ee0eb6bf98a: Do not play a long fight: either pour in heavy damage at once with an exit behind you, or leave the room before pressure builds.
entries.gt_ad3d0507b37988: The mechanic's capsule knocks three times: 'At riser fork 16 the valve tag tore off at the red intake. Take the tag, but first check the wet floor: there is current from the panel there and no witnesses.'
entries.gt_af7970f58f9b38: Pseudolift snapped shut on ${marker.itemName}. The cabin softened, and the route became honest again.
entries.gt_b1d0ef3e2b980b: Do not make noise by the door or drag the fight into the apartment: the settler holds to its room, grows angry at theft and noise, and a calm report breaks the buildup.
entries.gt_b1eec140aee662: The maze is endless, and I am in it.
entries.gt_b2f754820d53e2: Break the first lunge with buckshot, throw marked bait past yourself, and keep food reserves in a closed container.
entries.gt_b2fa0af0f96fd4: The corpse twitched under the mycelium. A useful plate dried near the edge.
entries.gt_b3112aa1b35cb6: A pneumomail control coupon fell from the capsule: check the pressure log in sorting and return the sheet with the shift number. Payment after handoff is fuses and water coupons; losing the log will close the node.
entries.gt_b3f900e3961a03: Do not trust the patrol after a heavy all-clear: keep distance, hide samples, and check the mask number before opening the door.
entries.gt_b4a909b44d0486: The sorter belt pulls you toward the receiver. The panel can be jammed with the interact key.
entries.gt_b613dad935f6e2: The office field is stronger by desks, cabinets, and papers in your pocket: hide behind a cabinet, close in point blank after the volley, or drop extra forms into a container.
entries.gt_b6637f8cb1a0d4: Screen blinks: NO CAPSULE FOR ACT.
entries.gt_ba261cbd19e3b3: NET GEN found. Terminals will open the map editor.
entries.gt_ba76726d13d565: NET GEN found. Terminals will open the map editor.
entries.gt_bae9b2cb612ee4: Hermodoor pinched the borer. It scrapes more slowly.
entries.gt_bb0ca3580085f4: Gnilushka accepted ${helped.name} and whispered about the soft door by the lower lift.
entries.gt_bb0eebeadf99f6: Light or UV will delay it. Close the trap door, kill it, repair with sealant, or find another shelter.
entries.gt_bb238af57214d0: slimy scrape, dirty sample, rare filtering layer
entries.gt_bbb459885ec068: Smells documents like blood: drop extra papers, forms, and stubs into a box before the fight. Without paper smell it tracks worse; keep distance and lose it around corners.
entries.gt_bbcae8c28b8d59: Need wire or electrical tape for the wedge.
entries.gt_bc33b9d5e6c71d: Watch raised corners and green veins: go around the opening, burn from range, or keep a filter until you cross the carpet.
entries.gt_bc9964867944b5: Light knocked the borer off the seam. The door gained a few extra seconds.
entries.gt_bd41c73c479cbf: Intercepted a sealed pneumocapsule. It can be sold or turned in as tampering.
entries.gt_bf32afd1e6fee9: Fragile, but crashes into doorway crowds: strike before it gains speed, fall back to a wide passage, and do not fight in doorway mush.
entries.gt_bfb09325dc9a83: The capsule smells of iodine and carries NII instructions: carry the black sample for burning, keep the white one in a dark box, turn in the transparent one only with an intact seal. The market pays faster, but later they look for the courier.
entries.gt_bfd25323d203d6: The white windup is short: break the line with wall, door, apparatus, or machine; buckshot interrupts the blades before the dash.
entries.gt_c163b52018fa81: Do not chase the first silhouette into darkness: stand still, keep a lit exit behind your back, or reveal the real body with a flashlight before the second hit.
entries.gt_c1b99ca2e98755: The Creator closed the return route. An ordinary door will not take you home now.
entries.gt_c22e1d2841b38e: Salt hissed in the red mold. The root lost one feed crate.
entries.gt_c27981051a0c41: void spines and an ownerless contour receipt
entries.gt_c37aa159905a92: ${route.unavailableLine ?? 'Табло щелкает, но линия здесь не принимает посадку.'} ${route.clue}
entries.gt_c38bd03fd63bf5: A capsule with a wet map insists that lift Z+22 is now above the kitchen. The ink is fresh, the dispatcher did not accept the route; you can follow it only as bait for checking someone else's post.
entries.gt_c420e53ab5c47b: Bait it away from the wall to the room center: by a panel it keeps armor and reaches with a slab hand; on open floor it slows.
entries.gt_c6412f0b45872e: Chervie is strong only near screens and the server apparatus: break the line to the screen, burn out or disable the local apparatus, then finish the avatar. Energy weapons and GBE decide faster than a normal burst.
entries.gt_c669ccc60f8c3b: The interception hatch asks for a key, crowbar, or wrench.
entries.gt_c6f6a063f5cc21: Gray-green scrape left voluntarily after handing Gnilushka over to the NII.
entries.gt_c722a4c8acc42b: Do not hug the panel: keep one and a half cells and the room center, and throw food or govnyak sideways to break contact.
entries.gt_c79d7554c22a80: Slow, but already close in a doorway, bathroom, or water: retreat in a straight line, not with your back to plumbing, and lure it aside with bait.
entries.gt_caf0ff384ec879: The Herald breaks into a threshold scream. Finish from cover or retreat.
entries.gt_caf3bb93c98a27: Gnilushka whispers: 'the low lift is as loud as a siren; do not stand by the soft door'.
entries.gt_cb3ab50bc02e38: Medium samosbor moved as a wave from ${ax},${ay}.
entries.gt_cc97f848e84a5c: ${train.label}: doors open. The platform attendant nods: ride, get out, or wait by the wall.
entries.gt_ce333c20f81999: Chorus broken: the child mouths closed. The Matka is open briefly.
entries.gt_cf1a5e0711f9c9: moldy fringe, spore print, rare filtering layer from old lining
entries.gt_d06f5618c59807: rust, rebar shard, black oily rag, rare usable bar
entries.gt_d06fe28e35ec3b: Marfa Porogovaya: 'The threshold is open. If you see the green floor, enter quickly, but do not follow the voices aside.'
entries.gt_d0d4f32114d73c: Do not stand in the trough: dry edge and bridge cut the eel's tempo, the harpoon reaches through water, and bait draws it off the route.
entries.gt_d0dcb3b3f14135: Slimevik reaches a tendril toward food, water, or medicine. Without a gift, better not press close.
entries.gt_d10d29666de2fa: Nowhere to put the ration issue. Free space before the window.
entries.gt_d162c4600c37a8: The Idol does not move: cut the angle with a wall or door and move point blank between PSI shots.
entries.gt_d16845d3f53a0e: Eat only from hunger; the best raw path is a fresh sample, boiling, or a dirty sale with consequences.
entries.gt_d18d7c2af6af84: Green warmup means volley: break the firing line with a corner or door before the flash, then close while the eye reloads.
entries.gt_d198b9b8b0e6ec: The mycelium flared up and shrank into black sweet ash.
entries.gt_d2b837e513f3b0: Do not trade blows in a straight corridor: corners, stamina reserve, noise, fire, or a sealed weak opening give a window to leave.
entries.gt_d396521ff7c1b9: The Hermodoor Borer damaged ${runtime.targetRoomName}. You can still repair before closing.
entries.gt_d46dba8fc3ae44: The section apparatus clicked a relay. The shift is frozen for almost a minute.
entries.gt_d69ac9decbbe19: You moved away from the shaft. The thread twitched and went back into concrete; the lift refused to argue.
entries.gt_d7e1d2dbdade31: The shavings scattered into gray dust. Fingers sting, but the documents are silent: HP -2.
entries.gt_d8c090f1f35d7c: The source is already closed with a gray bandage.
entries.gt_d95eae470069bb: Slimevik ate ${trade.itemName} and marked a sample nearby.
entries.gt_daef317ea855fd: The cabin opened into a meat shaft. Hold the threshold or retreat from the lift vestibule.
entries.gt_dbc55758e1d2f1: Nowhere to hide the payment for a place. The queue does not hold other people's pockets.
entries.gt_dbf127aabb5d54: Fog shark gas bubble burst: caught ${hitCount}.
entries.gt_dc1e2ee70b87a5: Rails tremble: train close. Get to the platform before the cabin enters the turn.
entries.gt_dda1667fc6bb9e: The Creator's last contour trembles. You can retreat; greed keeps the line open.
entries.gt_de0e46a74a2dc0: fatty metal, command organics, energy cell, stoppered voice
entries.gt_deff1956a64a27: Do not stand in the windup: three steps, a corner, or a column break the dash; buckshot interrupts the saws, an armor sheet takes one cut.
entries.gt_e0c2c44187b00f: Node knocked off rhythm. The tunnel stopped and overgrew ${cleared} cells.
entries.gt_e2eff6792a9daa: Mancobus is charging a fat volley: leave the straight sector around a corner.
entries.gt_e3e04e78189c8a: The section seam moved sideways. You can dodge or switch off the apparatus.
entries.gt_e6c0090cae98a5: ${ctx.def.name} lay on the crack. The swarm lost its source.
entries.gt_e7bdf2e83963c4: Bones lie dry by the entrance: carnivorous mycelium waits for meat, salt, or fire.
entries.gt_e7f51330a67b27: Projector prints Bad Apple! onto the concrete again.
entries.gt_e8a5be267f03a7: spoiled protocol, sealing-wax crumb, and paper with an empty place for your surname
entries.gt_e8a6eb2d5045cb: psychic residue, PSI dust, rare antidepressant from wet memory
entries.gt_e8c64d06594fcc: The tunnel grows over underfoot: concrete left a living scratch.
entries.gt_ea791ec9315bd3: The Herald listens to an open line. A door, corner, or column breaks its voice volley.
entries.gt_eb7db4e795c838: Carry as a poor dry ration; use only knowing that water, movement, and healing will get worse.
entries.gt_ebe63dab7002a8: Mancobus spread its guns. Remove the guards, hold the column, and hit only between volleys.
entries.gt_ec1e3b1f15c780: Slimevik showed a sample and crawled away.
entries.gt_ec2cbdf5d193fb: The pocket is already thawed. The border holds only in patches.
entries.gt_ec423256785268: The dark dash is read by the silhouette's pause: step into light, switch on a flashlight, or break distance before the first hit.
entries.gt_edc008a1cd6c96: Do not fight by water, pipe, or pit: Olgoy is slow on dry floor, but bites heavier by a collector and pulls toward the mouth. Raw meat distracts it better than bread.
entries.gt_ef5dbdbc31373a: The screen clicked with an empty tooth. Need metal, food, or mushroom mass.
entries.gt_f15661b7a4ae2c: Hladon released the boots. You can walk at your own pace now.
entries.gt_f2d0ff73bec06b: Check by distance: do not let the silent neighbor close without light, a witness, and a free exit behind you.
entries.gt_f3233b4e335782: The pipe is already clogged. A new capsule will only get stuck beside the wedge now.
entries.gt_f3bfbd6944ee72: Zakalennaya Armatura's armor is stripped. Now it is a slow target.
entries.gt_f3eebbb6b3ef38: Dried is safer than raw, but tanned skin still leaves the smell of trouble and the queue keeps standing.
entries.gt_f47ddb6035d155: pale threads, harness fragments, sticky sac, rare wire coil
entries.gt_f5199b479e2980: In fog the pack is fast and bites with a lunge: get to dry air, close doors and corners, while fire kills reliably but detonates the gas belly nearby.
entries.gt_f580109af5f2de: borshchevik seeds, yellow phototoxic sap, rare antifungal consumable
entries.gt_f5e77e360c6457: The pipe is clamped. For ten minutes capsules will look for another path.
entries.gt_f87d6a5dd81fb9: ${npcName} bought the shavings for the NII and immediately asked which door repeated. +${reward}₽
entries.gt_f8953458d6e9a4: red mold, damp bark, rare living root for the NII or cult
entries.gt_f99dbd2756667f: The dangerous beat faded. Passage is open briefly.
entries.gt_fa735abf9611dd: The Creator's contour closed: get behind a wall before the green discharge.
entries.gt_fb44d397cf500b: Do not open the door to a plaintive howl. Loud metal, a noise can, a valve, or shotgun scares the pack and tears the target for a few seconds.
entries.gt_fb63d7ca983bee: Inside is a fake stub and a route without shift signature. Turn in to liquidators - evidence against sorting; sell to the market - quick money and risk that the post learns your handwriting.
entries.gt_fbbf114e6d0f46: The air became glassy. Hladon cuts step and sleep.
entries.gt_fd6f0e70ea9595: A registry extract by itself is not a denunciation. Need a forged card as evidence.
entries.gt_fdcbb4e01e93a3: siren shard, threshold tag, sealed voice
entries.gt_fe5761cb97459c: You gave the NII container and route to Yakov. Gnilushka left quietly; a dry scrape remained on the floor.
entries.gt_ff1644ae676d1f: rubber crumb, sealed trash, rare gasket
